profile.presentation: Software developer in training with experience in React, Next.js, and Node.js, focused on becoming a full-stack developer.
profile.about-me: Software developer in training, focused on web application development with JavaScript, React, and Next.js. Currently expanding my knowledge towards full-stack development, working with Node.js and SQL and NoSQL databases. Advanced student of the Information Technology Technician at UTN, with expected completion in 2026. I stand out for my continuous learning ability, adaptability, and commitment, with an interest in joining a team where I can contribute value and continue developing professionally.

projects.project-description1: I created this website with the goal of simulating an e-commerce platform, aiming to enhance both interface and design while improving my skills in using Tailwind, Next.js, and React.
projects.project-description2: Stock management application using C#, .NET, and a SQL Server database. The app allows product registration, inventory control, quantity updates, and movement tracking. I implemented an intuitive interface with WinForms and secure database connectivity.
projects.project-description3: Landing page developed for a client in the coaching academy sector using WordPress, in collaboration with the Tic's con Alas Empresa Jr team. Worked alongside teammates on UI/UX design and prototyping using Figma, following Scrum methodology. Currently not hosted, but the prototype and design can be viewed at the following link by clicking on the image.
projects.project-description4: Website for Alas responsible for maintenance and updates. Along with my colleagues, we perform updates when required and necessary, in addition to being developers for companies and SMEs looking to take their business to the next level. Currently not hosted.

more-projects.little-project-description1: Calculator built using React that allowed me to understand concepts like 'useState'. Learning to manage states and dynamically update the user interface in response to user interactions.
more-projects.little-project-description2: I developed this weather application using JavaScript. The app provides accurate data and updated forecasts. Through this development, I gained new web development skills.
more-projects.little-project-description3: This app allows you to discover profiles of developers and interesting projects in the GitHub community. It also provides updated information about their repositories.
more-projects.little-project-description4: This app provides dictionary functionalities but in English, using the consumption of an API to reinforce knowledge.
more-projects.little-project-description5: This app allows you to search for your favorite Pokémon!! A frontend mentor challenge, I love these challenges!
more-projects.little-project-description6: This page allows you to search for the movie you want and see its statistics, reviews, and ratings! Go ahead and look for one!
more-projects.little-project-description7: I created this page for my partner who didn't know the bus routes. It is very useful as there is no well-structured page of this kind for the bus lines in my country, maybe it will be helpful if you're in Santa Fe!
more-projects.little-project-description8: This was my first To-Do List. I keep it as a memory and achievement. It might be something simple, but it has its time.
